name: Peach Cream Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel food cake (prepared loaf, frozen 7-inch, not evaporated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake into ½ inch slices and arrange half of them on the bottom of a 13X9 inch baking dish.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk and cold water; mix well.
3. Add the vanilla pudding mix and beat until combined.
4. Chill for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the almond extract.
6. Fold in the whipped cream.
7. Pour half of the cream mixture over the cake slices.
8. Arrange half of the peach slices on top.
9. Repeat layering, ending with the peach slices.
10. Chill for 4 hours or until set.
11. Cut into squares to serve. Refrigerate any leftovers. Garnish with fresh peach slices if desired.
